adjudication_rule: Evaluate each family independently. A transition occurs only when every positive or negative condition for that family is resolved by a verbatim Garrido response plus identified evidence or explicit signed expert judgment. An incomplete, ambiguous, conditional, silent or unsourced response is UNANSWERED_NO_STATE_CHANGE.
no_assumption_rules: A yes without operational definition, units, plausible range, timing and authority semantics, and source evidence or signed expert judgment is unanswered.
A domain-positive response does not establish H_PI, H_obs, learned value, retained value or promotability.
A domain-negative response blocks only the mapped physical mechanism; it is not a global impossibility proof.
No response can reopen Programs D-K3 by changing architecture, reward, horizon or metric.
The canonical endpoint remains ret_excel_visible_v1 through the repository aggregator.
Cobb-Douglas remains secondary unless all Q12 positive conditions are met; a positive Q12 then creates only co-primary eligibility pending a new frozen APP contract and MFSC recalibration.

transition_vocabulary.UNANSWERED_NO_STATE_CHANGE: Required facts are missing, ambiguous, conditional or unsupported; preserve source_state.
transition_vocabulary.DOMAIN_FACT_SUPPORTED_CONTRACT_REQUIRED: The physical mechanism is domain-supported, but a versioned contract, conservation ledger, parameter envelope, null cell and all pre-learner gates are still required.
transition_vocabulary.BLOCKED_DOMAIN_FACT_ANSWERED_NEGATIVE: The mapped mechanism is not present or authorized under the answered facts; no implementation is licensed.
transition_vocabulary.CURRENT_CONTRACT_REMAINS_FALSIFIED_NEW_M: The previous tested contract remains closed; the answer supports only a materially new versioned mechanism.
transition_vocabulary.MECHANISM_INCOMPLETE_SEPARATE_ACTION_REQ: The answer supplies information structure but no distinct irrevocable action capable of creating value.
transition_vocabulary.ACTIVE_BOUND_DOMAIN_SUPPORTED_BOUND_STIL: The active numerical family gains domain support but still requires its complete exact same-contract bound and all guardrails.
transition_vocabulary.BLOCKED_INVALID_PHYSICAL_INTERPRETATION: The proposed cross-stage resource interpretation is not domain-valid; numerical artifacts remain diagnostic only.
transition_vocabulary.CO_PRIMARY_ELIGIBLE_PENDING_CONTRACT: Q12 supplies the APP decision, ledger, measurable spare capacity and MFSC endorsement; Cobb-Douglas may be preregistered as co-primary only after a new contract and MFSC recalibration.
transition_vocabulary.SECONDARY_CONSTRUCT_ONLY: At least one Q12 requirement fails; Cobb-Douglas remains secondary construct sensitivity and cannot rescue canonical ReT.

questions.title: Finite shared fleet, reservation, lateral transfer and mode choice
Op7 inspection authority and latent quality state
Component-specific R13 and Op4 kit balancing
R14 detected-lot disposition and finite storage facts
APP cost ledger and MFSC scope of Cobb-Douglas

positive_conditions: At least two ration types have distinct BOMs, nonzero setup/minimum-run rules or only partial substitution.
Demand shares and an operational signal are defined with timestamps before product-mix commitment.
Shared Op5-Op7 capacity and all material/setup resources have units and plausible ranges.
negative_conditions: All ration types are perfectly substitutable with identical BOM/rate and zero setup, or no product-mix decision exists.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Any future claim is limited to a Garrido-approved multi-product extension, not the thesis single-product DES.

positive_conditions: Op10 and Op12 use a finite shared fleet reserved before service.
Booking lead, payload, vehicle-hours, dwell, cancellation/reassignment and route-specific degraded lead are defined.
A nonprivileged pre-booking signal is available before the commitment becomes irrevocable.
negative_conditions: Lift is nonbinding, dedicated by arc, freely and instantly reassigned, or no advance reservation decision exists.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Only advance transport reservation under validated fleet physics may be tested.

positive_conditions: True requested quantity is genuinely unobserved in at least one stockout or disruption state.
A report can be acquired before commitment and its reveal, lead, errors and conserved operational cost are defined.
negative_conditions: The complete requested quantity is always recorded and available, or no actionable report can arrive before commitment.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Demand already available to operators may not be hidden to manufacture information value.

positive_conditions: CSSU-to-CSSU transfer is operationally authorized.
Its payload, travel/return time, risk, source stock removal and distinct-or-shared lift ledger are defined.
The lateral lane can be faster or otherwise state-conditionally preferable to SB resupply.
negative_conditions: Lateral transfer is forbidden, physically unavailable or never preferable to SB resupply under the same resource ledger.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Only lateral balancing under a validated lane and resource distinction may be tested.

positive_conditions: Inventory, backlog, consumption or convoy reports have validated latency/error.
A separately validated upstream action is irrevocable before the delayed report arrives.
negative_conditions: Only reporting lag is present, or all consequential decisions remain reversible until the same information arrives.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Information lag alone cannot create value by information inclusion and does not reopen the falsified contract.

positive_conditions: Unfilled requirements have hard deadlines followed by permanent abandonment rather than indefinite backorder.
Deadline distributions are tighter than relevant 24-120 hour recovery times in a material share of orders.
Logistics has doctrinal authority to admit, decline or triage orders before they enter the pipeline.
Deadline/criticality class is observable before admission.
negative_conditions: Orders always backorder, deadlines are not tighter than recovery, or logistics lacks admission authority.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: The original demand stays in the sealed evaluator ledger; denominator deletion is forbidden.

positive_conditions: A named condition signal precedes a real Op5-Op7 failure with defined lead and errors.
A finite shared crew can prevent or materially shorten the failure with defined resource and duration.
Finished-stock cover is insufficient, making the failure consequential for canonical ReT at the practical scale.
negative_conditions: No precursor-predictable ReT-consequential failure exists, or inventory covers the downtime.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Program J and the tested alarm contract remain closed; severity or signal retuning alone cannot reopen them.

positive_conditions: Fewer cross-trained restoration teams exist than concurrently disabled sites.
Assignments consume mutually exclusive team, travel, activation and repair time.
Operation-specific repair work, preemption and the meaning of the thesis 120/672-hour values are defined.
A nonprivileged damage assessment is available before dispatch with defined lead/error.
negative_conditions: Recoveries are autonomous/parallel, teams are non-scarce, or no observation can affect assignment before commitment.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Current independent parallel recovery has exact zero sequencing liveness.

positive_conditions: Usable storage capacities at relevant nodes are finite, measured and can bind.
Dedicated/fungible space, overflow consequence and relocation/reconfiguration resource and lead are defined.
The operator has a pre-commitment allocation or reconfiguration decision.
negative_conditions: Storage is nonbinding, fixed without allocation authority, or reconfiguration is instantaneous and free.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Only storage-allocation value under measured capacity and handling constraints may be tested.

positive_conditions: Inspection intensity is operationally variable with measured effort, sensitivity, specificity and false-reject response.
A persistent latent quality state and nonprivileged pre-action signal are defined.
Escaped defects have a distinct operational consequence and inspection/rework consumes conserved resources.
Rework, scrap, hold and qualified-delivery acceptance rules are defined.
negative_conditions: Inspection is fixed, defects are independent with known constant probability, no pre-action signal exists, or escapes have no distinct consequence.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Current-kernel inspection action is absent and has H_PI=H_obs=0.

positive_conditions: At least two operational modes serve Op10 or Op12 with different payload, lead, eligibility or R22 exposure.
Each mode has finite fleet count and commitment removes that asset for a defined turnaround time.
State information capable of changing mode ranking is available before commitment.
negative_conditions: Only one mode exists, modes are equivalent, capacity is nonbinding, or mode status is known only after commitment.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Only validated last-mile mode selection may be tested.

positive_conditions: The operator chooses between at least two real routes to the same downstream demand.
Routes share a finite fleet and have defined payload, outbound/return time, R22 exposure and irrevocable commitment/reassignment rules.
Route degradation is persistent and an imperfect nonprivileged warning arrives before dispatch.
The proposed numerical envelope is accepted or replaced by sourced values.
negative_conditions: No alternate route choice exists, lift is not shared/finite, degradation is not persistent, or no actionable pre-dispatch warning exists.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: The existing route scaffold and heuristic null are neither a PI bound nor domain validation.

positive_conditions: One named real resource is fungible and mutually exclusively allocated among plant, LOC/vehicle and theatre response.
Its base, skills, travel, activation and dwell are defined.
One resource unit has a defined causal effect on recovery at every target.
Emergency reserve stock is separately budgeted and its issue/replenishment semantics are defined.
negative_conditions: The response functions use separate non-transferable resources or no one resource can causally serve all targets.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: A positive answer cannot replace the unresolved exact full-horizon frontier or restricted-PI ceiling.

positive_conditions: Logistics may allocate one fixed total ration loadout across distinct mission cohorts before deployment.
Pack/mass limits, authority, cohort identity and return/transfer rules are defined.
Mission-duration/resupply signals are timestamped before an irrevocable allocation with defined accuracy.
The evaluator preserves the sealed original cohort demand ledger.
negative_conditions: Loadout is fixed by doctrine, cohorts are not distinct, total resource is not conserved, or no signal exists before allocation.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Only validated mission-loadout allocation may be tested; no demand deletion or post-outcome relabeling is allowed.

positive_conditions: R13 identifies named components or suppliers and component state is observable before dispatch.
WDC may choose component composition or priority of a capacity-limited Op4 load.
BOM, stock/pipeline, payload, return, minimum lot, expedition and substitution rules are defined.
negative_conditions: R13 is a common delay, loads must remain proportional kits, component identity is unavailable, or lift is nonbinding.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Current-kernel component priority action is absent and has H_PI=H_obs=0.

positive_conditions: Return to Op6 is discretionary rather than mandatory.
Defect knowledge timing, rework duration/capacity/yield and replacement material/lead are defined.
Partial release, disposal, quality acceptance and persistent R14 attribution rules are defined.
Validated state variation can reverse rework versus replacement ranking under equal resources.
negative_conditions: Return to Op6 is mandatory or unit-yield same-rate rework weakly dominates discard in all states.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Current-kernel disposition action is absent and has H_PI=H_obs=0.

positive_conditions: A documented mission/climate/nutrition-compatible substitution matrix exists.
Substitution timing and authority are defined before fulfillment.
Original requested units remain in the sealed ledger and substituted units are fully conserved by type.
negative_conditions: Product substitution is not authorized or cannot preserve mission/nutrition requirements and original demand accounting.
family_mappings.claim_invariant: Demand deletion, deferral or denominator rewriting remains prohibited.

positive_conditions: Workforce or shift level is a genuine period-by-period Op5-Op7 decision including hiring, firing or overtime.
Relative coefficients and operational records are supplied or identified for regular production, overtime, inventory holding, backorders, hiring and firing.
Installed-versus-used spare capacity is a measurable line variable.
Garrido explicitly endorses application of the published factory-resilience construct to the MFSC Op5-Op7 subsystem with MFSC-range recalibration.
negative_conditions: Any positive condition is answered no, is unsupported or remains missing.
invariants: ret_excel_visible_v1 remains the canonical Paper 2 endpoint.
A positive Q12 does not validate the rejected Stage-A runner or its burned tapes.
No Cobb-Douglas ranking may rescue a canonical ReT null or waive lost-order, worst-node, resource or trajectory guardrails.
